strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Active community contributor through workshops, talks, and open-source libraries
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI-built products at platform scale
Career level reads as senior/staff IC rather than director-level principal
Cloud experience present but not positioned as deep strategic cloud/AI advisory
response.justification: The candidate brings roughly 15 years of versatile engineering across many stacks, founder experience with an open-source geo-data platform, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the resume lacks the recognized AI expertise, AI-product portfolio, and director-level strategic advisory footprint that this Principal Engineer role centers on, making the fit partial rather than strong.
